The '''''Gotal 2''''' was a [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]] assigned to [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Task Force Vengeance]]. It was equipped with additional space survey sensors.

It was destroyed alongside its sister [[Starship/Legends|ship]] [[Gotal (CR90 corvette)|''Gotal 1'']] during an attempt to locate the missing [[Immobilizer 418 Interdictor-class Heavy Cruiser|Immobilizer 418 cruiser]] ''[[Compellor]]'' in the [[Mobetta system/Legends|Mobetta system]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing vs. TIE Fighter: Balance of Power Campaigns]]'' {{1st}}
